plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of what I found and planned:

## Plan: `uv cache stats`

### What I explored

- **CLI layer** (`crates/uv-cli/src/lib.rs`): `CacheCommand` enum has `Clean`, `Prune`, `Dir`, `Size`. `SizeArgs` already has `--human`/`-H`/`--human-readable` — I'll copy the exact same pattern for `StatsArgs`.
- **Cache internals** (`crates/uv-cache/src/lib.rs`): `CacheBucket` has 11 variants (Wheels, SourceDistributions, FlatIndex, Git, Interpreter, Simple, Archive, Builds, Environments, Python, Binaries). `cache.bucket(variant)` returns its `PathBuf`. Note: `CacheBucket::iter()` omits `Python` — the stats command will use an explicit array so all 11 show up.
- **`cache_size` implementation** (`crates/uv/src/commands/cache_size.rs`): Uses `diskus::DiskUsage`, already-available `human_readable_bytes()` from `uv_console`. Gated behind `PreviewFeature::CacheSize`.
- **Preview flags** (`crates/uv-preview/src/lib.rs`): Simple bitflag enum; next available slot is `1 << 28`.

### 9 files touched

| | File |
|---|---|
| **Modified** | `crates/uv-cache/src/lib.rs` — add `CacheBucket::display_name()` |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv-cli/src/lib.rs` — add `Stats(StatsArgs)` variant + `StatsArgs` |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv/src/lib.rs` — dispatch arm |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv/src/commands/mod.rs` — `mod` decl + re-export |
| **New** | `crates/uv/src/commands/cache_stats.rs` — core implementation |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv-preview/src/lib.rs` — `CacheStats = 1 << 28` feature flag |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv-test/src/lib.rs` — `cache_stats()` + `with_filtered_cache_stats()` helpers |
| **Modified** | `crates/uv/tests/it/main.rs` — register test module |
| **New** | `crates/uv/tests/it/cache_stats.rs` — 3 integration tests |

details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation of `uv cache stats` subcommand. All rubric requirements fully met: (1) CLI variant `Stats(StatsArgs)` with human bool flag properly added; (2) Command implementation iterates over `CacheBucket::iter_all()` and uses `DiskUsage` for bucket sizing; (3) Function signature is `pub(crate) fn cache_stats` returning `Result<ExitStatus>` with `ExitStatus::Success`; (4) `--human` flag implemented with `human_readable_bytes()` for formatting; (5) Output includes per-bucket lines and total line; (6) Module properly registered in `mod.rs` with public re-export; (7) Dispatch wiring correctly matches `CacheCommand::Stats` in `lib.rs`; (8) Code follows exact patterns of existing `cache size` command including preview feature gating and warning system. Additional quality: helper methods `CacheBucket::iter_all()` and `display_name()` properly added, preview feature flag integrated cleanly, comprehensive integration tests with proper filtering, handles edge cases (non-existent cache root, missing bucket directories). Code is production-ready.
